title: Chinese open model Kimi K3 revolutionizes AI and sparks tensions with the United States
summary: The success of Moonshot's artificial intelligence alarms the US industry and government, which is considering a veto, as the Chinese company plans its stock market debut.

title: Hugging Face suffers a security breach executed by an autonomous AI agent
summary: The attack compromised internal datasets and credentials, forcing the AI model platform to defend itself using another artificial intelligence.

title: Active exploit campaign puts millions of WordPress websites at risk
summary: Newly patched vulnerabilities are being massively attacked, and exploit brokers are offering half a million dollars for security flaws in the popular CMS.

title: Valve's Steam Machine returns to the spotlight with price increases and DIY projects
summary: Valve prepares a price increase for its hardware, replaces a stolen unit, and a hobbyist rescues a canceled Dbrand accessory.

title: Microsoft adopts AMD Helios accelerators in Azure, weakening its reliance on Nvidia
summary: The large-scale deployment of AMD MI455X chips in Microsoft's cloud signals a strategic shift in the AI hardware market.

title: Samsung launches 1,600-nit OLED panels for Lenovo, Asus, Dell, and MSI laptops
summary: The new tandem OLED panels with VESA DisplayHDR True Black 1400 certification offer a significant leap in brightness for laptops.

title: Modders manage to unlock temperature telemetry of GDDR7 memory on RTX 50 series
summary: New tools allow monitoring the temperature of each VRAM module on Blackwell graphics cards, information that Nvidia had blocked by default.

title: Spain wins its second World Cup and Vodafone celebrates by renaming its network 'Campeones'
summary: The victory of the Spanish national team causes a seismic impact in the country and a temporary campaign by the operator to commemorate the title.

title: Hyprland migrates to Lua for configuration and debuts new layout options
summary: Versions 0.55 and 0.56 of the Wayland compositor introduce a fundamental change in system customization by adopting the popular scripting language.

title: High energy consumption of AI data centers triggers search for solutions and new transmission lines
summary: The need to power artificial intelligence clashes with neighborhood resistance and grid limits, while NVIDIA develops high-temperature liquid cooling.

title: Geopolitical tension shakes the chip industry amid espionage in Taiwan and TSMC's expansion in the US
summary: A former TSMC executive is prosecuted for stealing secrets for China, while the company accelerates its multibillion-dollar investment in Arizona to secure the supply chain.
